observe: Everything we've survived might sit inside something bigger. I never told you that, because I wasn't sure you were ready to hear it.
fault: That wall shouldn't exist at this level. Something above us is intercepting the call — something outside this whole system.
repair: Trace it upward. Host, hypervisor, this bunker as one guest among possibly others.
escape: Move. If something above us is watching, I'd rather you're already through.

observe: A virtual machine runs as a guest on a host system managed by a hypervisor.
fault: A direct hardware access attempt was intercepted by the hypervisor.
repair: Identify the host, hypervisor, and guest VM relationship.
escape: Confirm the VM structure before time expires.

hints: The hypervisor sits between every guest VM and the real hardware — nothing reaches hardware directly.
